name: CROSS_TOP_TARGETS_BY_CANCER
cypher:
MATCH (c:Cancer {name:$cancer})<-[:DIFFERENTIAL_AND_HIGHLY_EXPRESSED_IN]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
RETURN t.symbol AS target, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target
LIMIT 10;

examples: 某癌种下高频靶点有哪些？
